scripts.lint: node --check packages/ui/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/i18n.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/menu-model.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/menu-model.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-layout.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-layout.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-resize.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-resize.test.mjs && node --check packages/viewport/src/index.mjs && npm --workspace @futureaero/desktop run build
